rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Atexec.py Execution

rules.rule_text:
title: Atexec.py Execution
id: 317bdc3b-f4a6-4664-b810-6dffb18fc7f5
status: experimental
description: "This detection analytic identifies Impacket\u2019s atexec.py script\
  \ on a target host. atexec.py is remotely run \non an adversary\u2019s machine to\
  \ execute commands on the victim via scheduled task. The command is commonly \n\
  executed by a non-interactive cmd.exe with the output redirected to an eight-character\
  \ TMP file. Part of \nthe RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/impacket/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.s0357
- attack.execution
- attack.t1053
- attack.t1053.002
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \svchost.exe
    - \taskeng.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - cmd.exe
    - /c
    - windows\temp
    - ' > '
    - 2>&1
    TargetFilename|contains|all:
    - windows\temp
    - .tmp
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
